observations: Ground-mounted utility-scale or large commercial solar array visible across multiple rows
Panels appear to be fixed-tilt, single-axis or fixed ground mount on steel post frames
Array is installed in an open rural paddock setting with grass understorey
No workers visible in frame — likely a completed or partially completed array being reviewed
Sky shows cumulus cloud buildup — potential weather change to monitor

installQualityFlags.message: Grass and vegetation directly under and around array is long — fire risk in dry conditions and potential shading issue as growth continues. Schedule vegetation management.
No visible cable management or DC conduit runs from this angle — verify underslung DC cables are secured in UV-rated conduit and not resting on ground or vegetation.
Panel surfaces appear clean and undamaged from this distance but confirm no micro-cracks or soiling on rear rows not visible in frame.
Row spacing appears reasonable for this tilt angle but verify inter-row shading distances meet design spec for this latitude — cloud cover today may mask shading issues during commissioning checks.

timeOnTaskNote: No active worker visible in frame. If this is a post-install walk-around inspection, allow 15–20 minutes per row to check clamp torque, cable routing, and earthing continuity on a ground mount of this size.
nextSteps: Walk each row and verify all DC cables are clipped into cable management trays or conduit, not trailing on the grass — UV degradation and rodent damage risk is high in paddock environments.
Check vegetation height under the array and arrange a mow or herbicide treatment before handover to prevent fire hazard and shading losses.
Confirm all panel clamps are torqued to manufacturer spec (typically 20–25 Nm) and record in the commissioning checklist before sign-off.

visualCallouts.label: Long grass risk
visualCallouts.message: Grass under the array is too long — fire risk and rodent habitat. Flag for vegetation management before handover.

visualCallouts.label: Check cable runs
visualCallouts.message: DC cable routing under this row is not visible — get underneath and confirm conduit is clipped and sealed.

spokenCue.say: Check DC cables under each row are conduit-clipped and off the ground.
